name: CASCADE LAKES BREWERY RM27
address: 21175 SE REED MARKET ROAD, BEND, OR 97702

fr.recommendations: Enhancing emergency response effectiveness for this property could involve ensuring that the single access point is sufficiently wide and clearly marked to facilitate quick and unhindered entry by emergency vehicles. Additionally, maintaining clear and navigable pathways between multiple structures may enhance responder movement and improve operational efficiency during an emergency. Illuminated and well-marked pathways can contribute to better visibility, assisting responders in locating the main building, roof system, and other critical areas. Providing ample space in the vehicle parking area for staging emergency apparatus would further support effective response operations. Regularly maintaining the landscaped area to prevent overgrowth near access routes can improve visibility and maneuverability. Designating and clearly marking a dedicated zone for emergency response near the outdoor gathering area can further optimize response coordination and efficiency.

wildfire.recommendations: Increasing the separation between vegetation and structures may enhance defensible space and reduce potential fire exposure to the property. Managing the vegetation adjacent to the structure by trimming or selectively removing combustible elements could further mitigate potential ignition sources. Ensuring that the open green spaces remain well-maintained and free of excessive combustible debris can improve defensible space and reduce fuel continuity. Maintenance of scattered shrubs, especially if they are near key structural components, could provide additional protection and help maintain critical separation. Regular management activities such as pruning shrubs and removing dead material could bolster the long-term resilience of the property and support overall wildfire preparedness.
